channel.title: AsyncAPI on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in AsyncAPI on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: security: Unpacking the AsyncAPI npm supply chain compromise and import-time payload delivery
item.description:
Microsoft reports that attackers compromised AsyncAPI npm packages and used trusted CI/CD workflows to distribute malware via npm. The writeup details the attack chain, import-time payload delivery, and suggested defenses.

  • Source: Microsoft Security Blog
